titles.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Cuts His wife's Private Part
Chapter on What is Obligatory Upon One Who Cuts His wife's Private Part

segments: "إِنَّ فِي كِتَابِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً قَطَعَ فَرْجَ اِمْرَأَتِهِ لَأُغْرِمَنَّهُ لَهَا دِيَتَهَا فَإِنْ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ إِلَيْهَا اَلدِّيَةَ قَطَعْتُ لَهَا فَرْجَهُ إِنْ طَلَبَتْ ذَلِكَ" ".
arabic.text: "إِنَّ فِي كِتَابِ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً قَطَعَ فَرْجَ اِمْرَأَتِهِ لَأُغْرِمَنَّهُ لَهَا دِيَتَهَا فَإِنْ لَمْ يُؤَدِّ إِلَيْهَا اَلدِّيَةَ قَطَعْتُ لَهَا فَرْجَهُ إِنْ طَلَبَتْ ذَلِكَ" ".

segments:
Hadith.5333 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, in the book of Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), it is written: 'If a man were to cut off the private part of his wife, I would obligate him to pay her full blood money (diyyah). If he does not pay her the diyyah, I would cut off his private part for her if she demands it.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5333 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, in the book of Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), it is written: 'If a man were to cut off the private part of his wife, I would obligate him to pay her full blood money (diyyah). If he does not pay her the diyyah, I would cut off his private part for her if she demands it.'"

narratorChain.raw: 5333 - رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ سَيَابَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
